sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation found in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Player can fire in eight directions. Weapons include handgun, magnum, shotgun, and hand grenades

special_mechanics.name: Helicopter Cable Entry
special_mechanics.description: Level begins with player character jumping with cable from helicopter

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Sources contain uncompiled code fragments and development notes but no explicit physics parameters. Game described as 'fast, fun, and explosive' platformer with run-and-gun gameplay. Primary gameplay is platform-focused with two overhead top-down shooter segments. Level design uses metatiles (165+ documented). No quantitative movement, gravity, or jump physics values documented in available sources.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor (TCRF) - Demolition Man (SNES)
